title: schefflera polyphylla
intro: Schefflera polyphylla, also known as the Umbrella Tree or Variegated Schefflera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. The plant is primarily used in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schefflera polyphylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Schefflera polyphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
